memoryArtifacts.headline: The icon of Saint Michael of Chernigov
Michael of Chernigov at the camp of Batu Khan (1883), painting by Vasiliy Smirnov.

Князь Михаил Черниговский перед ставкой Батыя. Боярин Феодор Черниговский - за спиной Михаила; юноша - сын Михаила, за спиной у него - Борис Ростовский; с ножом - Доман Путивлец; тянет руку к Михаилу - Елдига, стольник Батыя.
Saint Michael of Chernigov or Mikhail Vsevolodovich ( c. ?1185 - Saray , 20 September 1246)
memoryArtifacts.description: Saint Michael of Chernigov or Mikhail Vsevolodovich ( c. ?1185 - Saray , 20 September 1246) was a Rus ' prince (a member of the Rurik dynasty ). He was grand prince of Kiev [now Kyiv], 1236 - 1240, 12 …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Michael of Chernigov於1179年出生在蘇聯烏克蘭ВорошиловградськаКраснодонськийІванівка時，他的父親Vsevolod IV of Kiev26歲，母親Princess Maria Anastasia Piast15歲。他和Olena Maria Romanova至少有7個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1246年9月30日在俄羅斯莫斯科享年67歲，埋葬在俄羅斯莫斯科。

nameMeanings.name: Michael
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of a common biblical name (meaning ‘who is like God?’ in Hebrew) borne by one of the archangels, the protector of the ancient Hebrews, who is also regarded as a saint of the Catholic Church. In the Middle Ages, Michael was regarded as captain of the heavenly host (see Revelation 12:7–9), symbol of the Church Militant, and patron of soldiers. He was often depicted bearing a flaming sword. The name is also borne by a Persian prince and ally of Belshazzar mentioned in the Book of Daniel. Since the early 1900s it has been one of the most enduringly popular boys' names in the English-speaking world.  See also  Michal .

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

en.lifeSummary: When Michael of Chernigov was born in 1179, in Ivanovka, Krasnodon, Voroshilovgrad, Ukraine, Soviet Union, his father, Vsevolod IV of Kiev, was 26 and his mother, Princess Maria Anastasia Piast, was 15. He had at least 7 sons and 3 daughters with Olena Maria Romanova. He died on 30 September 1246, in Moscow, Russia, at the age of 67, and was buried in Moscow, Russia.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Michael of Chernigov est né en 1179, à Ivanovka, Krasnodon, Voroshilovgrad, Ukraine, Union soviétique, son père, Vsevolod IV of Kiev, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Princess Maria Anastasia Piast, avait 15 ans. Il a eu au moins 7 fils et 3 filles avec Olena Maria Romanova. Il est décédé le 30 septembre 1246, à Moscou, Russie, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterré à Moscou, Russie.

de.Kiev, Kiev, Empire russe: Kiew, Kyyivsʹkyy Povit, Kiev, Russisches Kaiserreich
de.lifeSummary: Als Michael of Chernigov 1179 in Ivanovka, Krasnodon, Voroshilovgrad, Ukraine, Sowjetunion geboren wurde, war sein Vater Vsevolod IV of Kiev 26 und seine Mutter Princess Maria Anastasia Piast 15. Er hatte mit Olena Maria Romanova mindestens 7 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 30. September 1246 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Moskau, Russland und wurde in Moskau, Russland begraben.

Lui avuto almeno 7 figli e 3 figlie con Olena Maria Romanova. Morì il 30 settembre 1246, nel Moskva, Russia, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolto a Moskva, Russia.

ja.lifeSummary: Michael of Chernigovが1179年にソビエト連邦ウクライナВорошиловградськаКраснодонськийІванівкаで生まれた時，父Vsevolod IV of Kievは26歳，母Princess Maria Anastasia Piastは15歳であった。彼はOlena Maria Romanovaとの間に少なくとも7人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1246年9月30日にロシアモスクワで67歳で死去し，ロシアモスクワにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Michael of Chernigov(이)가 1179년 소련 우크라이나 Ворошиловградська Краснодонський Іванівка에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Vsevolod IV of Kiev(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Princess Maria Anastasia Piast(은)는 15세였다. 그는 Olena Maria Romanova(와)과 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1246년 9월 30일 러시아 Москва에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 러시아 Москва에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Michael of Chernigov родился в 1179 г. в местности Ивановка, Краснодонский, Ворошиловградская, Украина, Советский Союз, его отцу по имени Vsevolod IV of Kiev было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Princess Maria Anastasia Piast, 15. У него было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 3 дочери от Olena Maria Romanova. Он умер 30 сентября 1246 г. в местности Москва, Россия в возрасте 67 лет и был похоронен в местности Москва, Россия.
